contentBlocks.original:
ॐ नम॑स्ते अस्तु भगवन्-विश्वेश्व॒राय॑ महादे॒वाय॑
त्र्यम्ब॒काय॑ त्रिपुरान्त॒काय॑
त्रिकाग्निका॒लाय॑ कालाग्निरु॒द्राय॑ नीलक॒ण्ठाय॑
मृत्युञ्ज॒याय॑ सर्वेश्व॒राय॑
सदाशि॒वाय॑ श्रीमन्महादे॒वाय॒ नमः॑
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ nama̍stē astu bhagavan-viśvēśva̠rāya̍ mahādē̠vāya̍
tryamba̠kāya̍ tripurānta̠kāya̍
trikāgnikā̠lāya̍ kālāgniru̠drāya̍ nīlaka̠ṇṭhāya̍
mṛtyuñja̠yāya̍ sarvēśva̠rāya̍
sadāśi̠vāya̍ śrīmanmahādē̠vāya̠ nama̍ḥ
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ, salutations to You, O revered Lord of the Universe, the great God, the Three-eyed One, the vanquisher of Tripura, the One beyond the three aspects of time, O Rudra, the fiery embodiment of destruction and renewal, the Blue-throated One, the Conqueror of death, the Lord of all beings, the eternally auspicious one, the blessed Mahādeva.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; नमस्ते (namaste) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – let it be; भगवन् (bhagavan) – O revered Lord; विश्वेश्वराय (viśveśvarāya) – to the Lord of the Universe (viśva:universe | īśvarāya:to the Lord); महादेवाय (mahādevāya) – to the great God (mahā:great | devāya:to the God); त्र्यम्बकाय (tryambakāya) – to the Three-eyed One (tri:three | ambakāya:to the eyed One); त्रिपुरान्तकाय (tripurāntakāya) – to the vanquisher of Tripura (tri:three | pura:cities | antakāya:to the vanquisher); त्रिकाग्निकालाय (trikāgnikālāya) – beyond the three aspects of time (tri:three | kā:aspects | agnikālāya:beyond time); कालाग्निरुद्राय (kālāgnirudrāya) – to the fiery Rudra (kāla:time | agni:fire | rudrāya:to Rudra); नीलकण्ठाय (nīlakaṇṭhāya) – to the Blue-throated One (nīla:blue | kaṇṭhāya:to the throated One); मृत्युञ्जयाय (mṛtyuñjayāya) – to the Conqueror of death (mṛtyu:death | jaya:conqueror | āya:to); सर्वेश्वराय (sarveśvarāya) – to the Lord of all beings (sarva:all | īśvarāya:to the Lord); सदाशिवाय (sadāśivāya) – to the eternally auspicious one (sadā:eternally | śivāya:to the auspicious one); श्रीमन्महादेवाय (śrīmanmahādevāya) – to the blessed Mahādeva (śrīman:blessed | mahādevāya:to Mahādeva); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations;
